is_partial.description: If true, the response does not contain complete search results.

is_running.description: If true, the search request is still executing.

took.description: Milliseconds it took Elasticsearch to execute the request.

timed_out.description: If true, the request timed out before completion.

hits.description: Contains matching events and sequences. Also contains related metadata.

shard_failures.description: Contains information about shard failures (if any), in case allow_partial_search_results=true

total.description: Metadata about the number of matching events or sequences.

events.description: Contains events matching the query. Each object represents a matching event.

sequences.description: Contains event sequences matching the query. Each object represents a matching sequence. This parameter is only returned for EQL queries containing a sequence.

_index.description: Name of the index containing the event.

_id.description: Unique identifier for the event. This ID is only unique within the index.

_source.description: Original JSON body passed for the event at index time.

missing.description: Set to `true` for events in a timespan-constrained sequence that do not meet a given condition.

events.description: Contains events matching the query. Each object represents a matching event.

join_keys.description: Shared field values used to constrain matches in the sequence. These are defined using the by keyword in the EQL query syntax.
